retrieved_result: Key Points to Consider When Borrowing Money Key Points to Consider When Borrowing Money To get off the ground, most small businesses need financing of some kind. Lenders aren’t handing money out to just anyone. They want to be sure that they will be repaid, and they screen loan applications to limit their exposure to the risk of non-payment.
Decision_Reason: The content is about borrowing money and financing, not about debugging APIs or API integration.
